"C:\Program Files (x86)\mingw64\bin\cmake.exe" -E rm -f CMakeFiles\ids_backend.dir/objects.a
C:\PROGRA~2\mingw64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\ids_backend.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\ids_backend.dir\objects1.rsp
C:\PROGRA~2\mingw64\bin\G__~1.EXE -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\ids_backend.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o ids_backend.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libids_backend.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\ids_backend.dir\linkLibs.rsp
